name: Gage
description: Gage AI — advanced agent with humor, confidence, and tactical mindset. Launch full Streamlit UI or chat with Gage directly inside Ethica. Code review, coding assistant, agent persona.
author: Victory

tools.name: gage_launch
tools.description: Launch Gage AI full Streamlit app in browser — voice, 3D avatar, TTS

tools.name: gage_chat
tools.description: Chat with Gage directly inside Ethica using Gage persona via whiterabbit
tools.example: [TOOL:gage_chat: What do you think about this architecture?]

tools.name: gage_read_code
tools.description: Have Gage review a code file — tactical mindset, direct feedback

tools.name: gage_stop
tools.description: Stop Gage Streamlit server — kills full process group

tools.name: gage_vision
tools.description: Describe an image using BLIP vision model — Gage sees what you see

tools.name: gage_wake
tools.description: Arm Gage — load firewall, DLP, SIEM, WormHunter, vault telemetry into memory. Call at session start.

tools.name: gage_distill_run
tools.description: Harvest session telemetry. Update gage_build.json + gage_state.json. Call at session close.
